content_body:
We had a nice stay at the cabin. Our girls enjoyed walking to the river, fishing in the pond, playing in the yard, and eating hot dogs and smores cooked over the fire. The deer frolocing in and across the field was awesome!! We enjoyed sitting in the screened in porch and the firepit! Would reccomend going to the town of Blue Ridge. We enjoyed the Blue Ridge Seenic Railway  to Mccaysville and picking apples at Merceir Orchards. Thank you for sharing your house! 

The Ellenburg Family,
title: Awesome stay at the cabin!
